Notes: Targets the underspecified response to deleting absent data without prerequisites. The initial zone includes an unrelated RRset for post-update sanity checking and a helper A RRset at absent.campus.edu. so delete_rr can target a missing RR inside an existing RRset while delete_rrset can target an absent RRset at a name that otherwise exists.

Steps.Description: Attempt to delete a missing RR at an existing owner name using delete_rr, without prerequisites.

Steps.Name: absent.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Confirm whether the original RRset remained unchanged after the delete_rr attempt.

Steps.Name: present.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Check unrelated data to ensure the update did not alter other zone contents.
